Localization.Description: Attempt to escalate privileges using roles in MECM

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} failed to escalate privileges by changing role {object.name} in MECM on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to escalate privileges by exporting a role in MECM on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to escalate privileges by deleting role {object.name} in MECM on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to escalate privileges by importing a role in MECM on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to escalate privileges by creating role {object.name} in MECM on host {event_src.host}
